name: /import-eslint-config parses a legacy .eslintrc file and emits the rule list
command: printf '{"rules":{"no-eval":"error","no-console":"warn"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" .eslintrc --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'parsed_format=eslintrc' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_count=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
